name: Maraurn'Zol
abilities:
x◆: Take an extra movement turn for every 4 objectives taken.
2◆: Attack all heroes 1 space away.
4◆: Attack all heroes 2 spaces away.
7◆: Attack all heroes 3 spaces away.
Attacking deals ☼ to heroes life total.

Maraurn'Zol attacks around her through all objects. Allow heroes attacked to escape with a 2☼ or higher

Line of sight is limited to 6 spaces.
objectiveAbilities:
6◇: Add a clone of Maraun'Zol. The clone takes it's turn after Maraun'Zol.

9◇: Immediately take your turn. ALL random. No line of sight damage.

9◇: Immediately take your turn. ALL random. No line of sight damage.

name: Wyht, the Trickster
abilities:
x◆: Take an extra movement turn for every 3 objectives taken.
4◆: Randomly relocate any objective.
6◆: Make a hero discard a card (1st turn only)
9◆: Make a hero discard a card (2nd turn only)

Wyht Draws an extra card when she draws cards.
objectiveAbilities:
1◇: Add 1 more objective. ALL random.

6◇: Add 1 more objective. randomly

10◇: Choose a hero, they die.
raw:
x◆: Take an extra movement turn for every 3 objectives taken.
4◆: Randomly relocate any objective.
6◆: Make a hero discard a card (1st turn only)
9◆: Make a hero discard a card (2nd turn only)

Wyht Draws an extra card when she draws cards.

1◇: Add 1 more objective. ALL random.

6◇: Add 1 more objective. randomly

10◇: Choose a hero, they die.

name: Ghathag
abilities:
x◆: Take an extra movement turn for every 4 objectives taken.
2◆: Stalk 3 spaces.
3◆:Place a 2 life 2x1 obstacle
4◆: Stalk 3 more spaces.
6◆: Stalk 3 more spaces.

Allow heroes to escape with a 2☼ or higher if seen while moving.
Ghathag can not enter doors.

Line of Sight is limited to 4 spaces, and 1 when Stalking.
objectiveAbilities:
3◇: Place 2 obstacles

4◆: Obstacles have +2 life.

5◇: Place 2 obstacles.

7◆: Obstacles have +2 life.

9◇: Turn all obstacles into a minion(Roll each)

name: The Fog
abilities:
1◆: Attack all heroes 1 space away.
4◆: Attack all heroes 2 spaces away.
8◆: Attack all heroes 3 spaces away.
Attacking deals ☼ to heroes life total.

The Fog moves with a D20 instead of randomly. add +2 to movement rolls.

If a hero is attacked inside a building. Allow heroes to escape with a 2☼ or higher.

Line of sight is limited to 6 spaces.
objectiveAbilities:
2◆:Can see heroes through all objects.

2◆: Add a D4 to movement rolls.

4◆: Add a D4 to movement rolls.

9◇: Kill up to any 2 heroes that are not in a building.

name: Oblex
abilities:
1◆: Summon X/2◆ minions (round up)....
3◆: Or give +1 to a minion
5◆: All Minions can move 2 spaces each turn.

Oblex does not move extra times per objective collected.

Oblex can trade places with any minion after moving. Allow heroes seen to escape with a 3☼ or higher.
objectiveAbilities:
1◇: Summon 2 minions.
3◇: Summon 3 minions.

4◆: minion combat is +1
6◆: minion range is +1

5◇: Summon 4 minions.
7◆: minion combat is +1

9◇: Double the number of minions.
